title: crepidium tenue
intro: Crepidium tenue, also known as the delicate crepidium, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepidium tenue are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Crepidium tenue is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
